programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Sticky Tape : Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncing Ball : Bouncing Ball: Boots buys a super blue bouncy ball at the store, but it bounces off down the hill.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Backpack : Backpack: Dora remembers the first time she met her friend Backpack. Backpack is helping Dora carry her books back to the Library. Can they reach the Library before it closes?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Rescue, Rescue, Rescue : Rescue, Rescue, Rescue: Oh no! Three of our friends are in trouble. Baby Jaguar is stuck in a tree, Isa is stuck in a big sand hole, and Benny is stuck in his balloon on top of the Gooey Geyser. Who do we have to rescue first?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boot's Cuddly Dinosaur : Boot's Cuddly Dinosaur: It's bedtime, and Dora and Boots are having a sleepover. Dora has her teddy bear, Osito, but Boots can't find his cuddly dinosaur. Oh no! His dinosaur must have fallen out of his bag at Play Park.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Super Silly Fiesta : The Super Silly Fiesta: Bawk! It's fiesta time! Dora and Boots are invited to the Big Red Chicken's Super Silly Fiesta! There will be silly snacks, silly games, silly hats and even silly dancing.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Fix-It Machine : The Fix-It Machine: Uh oh! Boots has a hole - un hoyo - in his boot! But Dora knows what to do. They can go to the Super Duper Fix-It Machine to fix it right up!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baseball Boots : Baseball Boots: Boots loves baseball. He loves to run and catch and throw, but so far he's never gotten a hit. Boots is determined to get his first hit. Dora and Boots have a big baseball game today.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Best Friends : Happy Best Friends Day! Today's a special day for best friends to play together. Boots and Dora decide to meet for a picnic to celebrate. Boots is bringing chocolate; Dora is bringing yummy strawberries.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ABC Animals : A is for armadillo, but where are the rest of the animals in the ABC book? They're missing! Dora and Boots jump into the giant alphabet book to help the little armadillo solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Job Day : What do you want to be when you grow up? On today's adventure, Dora and Boots get to try all sorts of jobs - from a pilot to a chef to an archeologist. But what will Dora decide to be when she grows up?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Star Catcher : Excited, Dora puts the Star Pocket on Backpack and Dora and Boots set off on their very first star catching adventure. Their educational journey will take them all the way to the Cloud Castle, as they try to rescue an adorable baby star.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's First Trip : Dora tells the story of how she first met Boots. On their very first adventure, Dora and Boots have to bring instruments back to the Fiesta Trio so they can play for the cranky Queen Bee.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Star Mountain : Swiper swipes Dora's favorite necklace and flings it all the way to the top of Star Mountain! To get to the peak, Dora and Boots need to run up the Star Steps, climb up the Diamond, and make it through ice, wind, and snow!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: La Maestra de Musica : "Hola, hola!/ Hello, Hello!/ It's a great day for school/ You know!" Boots' music teacher, la maestra de música, needs to get to school in a hurry - but her bicycle is broken!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Daisy, La Quinceanera : It's Dora's cousin Daisy's 15th birthday party, her quinceañera! But the party can't start without Dora and Boots - they need to teach everybody the mambo!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save Diego : Dora's cousin Diego protects and defends all the animals in the rainforest. But in order to save a Baby Condor, Diego winds up trapped himself. And now he needs OUR help! ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Jaguar's Roar : Oh no! Baby Jaguar's best friend, Baby Bear, is stuck on a ledge atop Bear Mountain - and the ledge is cracking! With Baby Jaguar leading the way, Dora, Boots, and Diego race to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Crown for King BoBo : Dora and Boots set out to help King Juan el Bobo find his crown so we can all go to his Mamí's birthday party. Where did the forgetful king put his crown?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Got a Puppy : Abuela gives Dora and Boots a present for Dora's new puppy, but they'll have to watch out for Swiper, who's got a bunch of new swiping tricks up his sleeves.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Big Sister Dora : Dora has some really exciting news to tell us: Someone new is joining Dora's family! Someone who sleeps in a cradle, drinks from a bottle, wears diapers and likes to be rocked to sleep. Can you guess who it is? That's right!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots to the Rescue : Oh, no! Dora left her music homework in Boots' room. It's a song in English and Spanish, and she needs Boots to bring it to her school so she can sing it to the class.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies : Dora's baby brother and sister just love bananas, but they also love stories! So Dora tells them a Super Babies story! The Super Babies have to get their bananas back from that Super Villain Swiper the Fox.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: We're a Team : Dora and all her friends are at the Super Adventure Race! To win the race, they have to make it across the Troll's tricky Bridge, past the Volcano filled with gooey balls, over the giant wall, and all the way to the finish line.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mixed-Up Seasons : It's summertime, and Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach. But suddenly, they encounter the strangest sight - a snowman in Summer? What's wrong with this picture? Oh, no!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Shy Rainbow : Dora and Boots are hiking on Rainbow Rock when they come across a shy rainbow, Arco Iris, hiding behind a waterfall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Crab : Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach when all of a sudden they hear a call for help. It's a baby crab stuck in a net!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper the Explorer : Dora and Boots are playing catch when they discover a lost Baby Fox. And he wants his mommy! Just then, Swiper shows up to swipe Boots' superball.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Jack-in-the-Box : Dora's twin brother and sister have been sick and she wants to buy them a present to cheer them up. Way up on a toy store shelf, she finds a dusty Jack-in-the-Box.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bark, Bark to Play Park : It's Twins Day and everyone's getting ready for the big Twins Day Party at Play Park! Dora even has a surprise for her puppy Perrito. He has a twin too -- a long-lost puppy brother he hasn't seen since they were babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves Three Kings Day : "Happy Three Kings Day!" Dora, Boots, and Diego are dressed up as kings for the big Three Kings Day party. They'll be bringing a horse, a camel, and an elephant to carry the presents, and treats for the party, but Swiper scares the animals away!

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Hell Freezes Over : The chefs must compete in a sled race for an advantage in the winter soup challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.desc: The Grand Finale : The final contestants must learn menus and plan for the biggest service of their careers, taking place at Six Flags Magic Mountain. The winner of Season 18 is chosen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Plus, Drew tries the latest food trends on TikTok with chef Michelle Park.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias, "Friendsgiving" Cast : Host of Nickelodeon’s new animal talent show "Unleashed" comedian Gabriel Iglesias shares with Drew one of his favorite acts. programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day : Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.

Plus, a look at how our "50 First Dates" reunion sketch with Adam Sandler came together.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And The Dummy : Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Sells The Car : When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Great Train Robbery : Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Face To Face : Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To The Rodeo : Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Nursery School : Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's European Booking : Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Passports : Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Staten Island Ferry : Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bon Voyage : The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Second Honeymoon : Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets The Queen : Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fox Hunt : Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To Scotland : The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tour : Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Visits Grauman's : The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And John Wayne : Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.desc: The Psychic : Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Thief (Part 1) : A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Thief (Part 2) : While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Thoroughbred : A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Fastest Bot Alive! : When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous superspeed!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Railroad Rage : In his haste to polish Drift's Katana, Slipstream accidentally uses an acid that wrecks it. Before he can make repairs, the Bee Team races off to stop the Stunticons from stealing a high-tech train's engine.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Combine And Conquer : Bee insists his teambegin to follow his orders more rigorously, but this new micromanaging strategy shows cracks when Motormaster attacks a Meteor Deflector facility.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Survival Of The Fittest : The Autobots go face to face with two new Decepticons, Lugnut and Blitzwing.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Headmaster : Sari is kidnapped, and the evidence points to the Dinobots. So Prowl and Bulkhead head to a mysterious island to investigate with a highly suspicious Captain Fanzone on their tail.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Nature Calls : One of Sumdac's ex-workers takes control of an Autobot. He then takes the Autobot out on the town.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Megatron Rising, Part 1 : Prowl, Bumblebee and Sari head into the forest to find the source of mysterious Cybertronian energy readings.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Megatron Rising, Part 2 : When Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth, Optimus Prime demands Sari hand over her key for safekeeping. This causes her to run away, only to end up in the clutches of Blackarachnia.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Elite Guard : Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark. When the Autobots fail to defend the Earth from the Decepticons, they must fight harder than ever to protect the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Return Of The Headmaster : Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job when the Cybertron Elite Guard, led by Ultra Magnus, comes to Earth looking for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Mission Accomplished : Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Garbage In, Garbage Out : Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Velocity : The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Rise Of The Constructicons : Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Fistful Of Energon : When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy : Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Autoboot Camp : The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Black Friday : While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Sari, No One's Home : Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1 : Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2 : Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped,Part 1 : The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped, Part 2 : Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped, Part 3 : Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats. Meanwhile, Ratchet remembers his first encounter with Omega Supreme and grows frustrated with his uselessness to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Three's A Crowd : The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Where Is Thy Sting? : Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Five Servos Of Doom : Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Predacons Rising : When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Human Error, Part 1 : The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Human Error, Part 2 : On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Decepticon Air : It turns out that Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality. Now, Sari must free them before Soundwave completely turns them into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: This Is Why I Hate Machines : In an effort to speed up their return to Cybertron, Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm. The storm's energies reactivate Swindle, who frees his fellow Decepticon prisoners, and the group goes on to take over the ship.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Endgame, Part 1 : A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.desc: Planes, Frames and Automobiles : Mike and Frank negotiate with the sibling owners of an antique shop closed since the 1970s; the guys come upon a historic aircraft with an amazing back-story.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: My Sweet Ford : Mike and Frank find a classic 1933 Ford that's been sitting so long that a tree has grown around it, but nothing will stop them from rescuing this rare ride.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Joy of Sax : A garage door in Indiana leads to a wagon from the 1950s that Mike wants to own; on a musical mission from Dani, the guys scour a farm, which has more than chickens and pigs.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Time Warp : Mike and Frank are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of new-old stock and a secret bootlegging basement.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Sweet Homes Alabama : A relic from a legendary plantation home; a car dealership holds classic cars; the guys check out a freestyle shop.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cowzilla in Colorado : While Frank is on the mend, Mike and his brother Robbie crisscross Colorado and find a giant cow-shaped RV.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Signs of Struggle : Mike fights to free a massive vintage sign from a tight corner; the guys strike an impossible deal with the Sign Boss; Danielle and Frank take a final joyride in a 1956 Chevy.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tough Nut to Crack : When Frank goes nuts for a century-old snack icon, he must decide if it's worth the high asking price; Mike falls hard for a Roaring '20s roadster.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Bound for Badness : Mike and Frank make a killer backroom deal after winding up at the home of a former arms dealer and her Judo-champion husband.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Presidential Picks : The pickers are on a presidential trail as Mike and Danielle head for Pennsylvania, while Frank and Robbie are on a whistle-stop tour of North Dakota.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Picked a Peck of Pepper : In Texas, Mike and Frank tackle a mega pick at the first Dr. Pepper bottling plant; the guys engage in tough negotiations in a 50,000 square-foot warehouse.

programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success; In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year.

programme.title: R.E.M. -- Live in Milan 2008
programme.desc: Filmed at Arena Civica, Milan, this concert film will give all fans a live experience from start to finish; R.E.M. performs unforgettable version of their hits -- "Losing My Religion", "Drive," "Man On the Moon" and many more.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous : Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids : Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip : What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: What Is That Thing?/Buster's Best Behavior : Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show! : It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare : Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal : It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The World Record/The Cave : Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur : An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Election/Francine Goes To War : There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved : Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau : When Mary Moo Cow is cancelled, D.W. is devastated. How can television--or life as she knows it--ever be the same? Buster hasn't yet met Bitzi's new boyfriend, but he fears the worst. What if he is a Mom-stealer?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Just Desserts/The Big Dig : Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest : Sue Ellen is the champion of the popular Internet game, Virtualgoose.com, but she’s become obsessed! And now the gang has moved onto Best of the Nest. Will any of his friends be willing to forgo their computers for a real, live adventure?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success : Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies : The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy's Soccer Shocker/Brother, Can You Spare A Clarinet? : Muffy's proud that her dad is the new soccer coach--until he exhausts the team with demanding drills. The try-outs for the Young Person's Orchestra are coming to Lakewood Elementary and everyone agrees that Binky is a shoe-in.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos : Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap : After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More! : All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls : While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Good Sport/Crushed : When the Athlete of the Year Award doesn't go to Francine, she makes no effort to hide her hurt feelings from the recipient. Arthur can't believe his parents are hiring a babysitter--he's 8 years old, and babysitters are b-o-r-i-n-g!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th : When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery : Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan : Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy : To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: To Tibble the Truth/Waiting to Go : When the Tibble Twins' constant lying lands them in constant trouble, they promise to tell only the truth. Binky and Brain collide on the soccer field, breaking Brain's new watch and nearly breaking their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Elwood City Turns 100! : Arthur and his friends commemorate their 100th episode in style! Mr. Ratburn's class is chosen to stage a musical tribute to Elwood City for its centennial celebration, which quickly becomes a drama behind the curtain!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues : The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: Increasingly estranged from his own daughter, a boozy busboy (Sam Rockwell) gets a shot at redemption when an old friend (Rob Corddry) hires him to coach a varsity girls basketball team.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A man (Aaron Eckhart) and his wife (Nicole Kidman) begin to pull apart as they try various ways to cope with the accidental death of their young son.

programme.title: W.
programme.desc: George W. Bush (Josh Brolin) transforms himself from a ne'er-do-well son of privilege to president of the United States.

programme.title: Cold Mountain
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Hall's sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: Mayhem ensues when a hunter stumbles upon dead bodies, a stash of heroin and more than $2 million in cash.

programme.title: The Sapphires
programme.desc: A would-be music promoter (Chris O'Dowd) sees something special in a girl group of four Australian singers and takes them to Vietnam to perform for American troops.

programme.title: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: A mentally unstable IRS auditor (Will Ferrell) hears an author's (Emma Thompson) voice in his head and discovers that he is the ill-fated protagonist of her latest work.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Tree Strike Terror : In November 1995, American Airlines flight 1572 clips the tops of trees along Peak Mountain Ridge and strikes an instrument landing system antenna at Bradley International Airport in Hartford, Conn.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Mission Disaster : After losing two engines near enemy territory, US Air Force pilots abort their refueling mission and attempt to land their damaged plane.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Deadly Delivery : When a cargo plane crashes in Alabama, investigators must take an unusual approach to determine what happened on board UPS Flight 1354.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Cabin Catastrophe : After a midair explosion rocks Southwest Airlines 1380, the pilots struggle to regain control while flight attendants make a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Trained to Fail : A look at accidents caused by poor pilot training.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Radio Silence : A look at accidents caused by either a loss of pressurization or structural failure.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Deep Freeze : A design flaw sends American Eagle Flight 41-84 smashing into a cornfield outside of Chicago, killing all 68 people on board.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Time of War : Mistaken identity and hostile fire over enemy territory are among the many risks that pilots face in war zones around the world.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Sight Unseen : Saudi Airways and Kazakhstan Airlines jets hit each other at 14,000 feet sending both planes spiraling to the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Falling Fast : Investigators discover a shocking mistake when pilots must ditch their plane in the Mediterranean, killing 14 of the 34 passengers.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Heading for Disaster : A look at the frightening crash of Ethiopian Airlines Flight 409 in 2010; after ruling out terrorists, investigators came to a highly controversial conclusion.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pilot Betrayed : Two minutes after Scandinavian Airlines Flight 751 leaves Stockholm in 1991, smoke filters through the cabin and both engines fail, one erupting into flames.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Collision Course : A look at deadly mid-air collisions.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Death of the President : When Polish President Lech Kaczyński is killed in a plane crash, investigators discover that this was not simply a pilot error.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Carnage in Sao Paolo : TAM flight 402 slammed into a residential neighborhood and burst into flames, just seconds after lifting off from Congonhas airport in São Paulo, Brazil, killing all 95 people on board and three people on the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Deadly Data : With hidden flaws buried in their navigation systems, three planes suffer catastrophic computer errors that force investigators to dig deep for clues.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Ticking Time Bomb : From corrosion and metal fatigue to faulty repairs, three doomed airlines are brought down by gradually deteriorating parts.

programme.title: Ugly Americans
programme.desc: Kong of Queens : An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Ugly Americans
programme.desc: Wet Hot Demonic Summer : Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Esteemsters : When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: College Bored : When the Morgendorffers visit Jack and Helen's alma mater as part of a college prep course, Daria learns the truth about academia, and Quinn gets a taste of Greek life.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Camp Fear : Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Fizz Ed : After Lawndale High gets roped into a marketing scheme as a result of school budget cuts, Ms. Li gets in over her head, and Daria takes a stand.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Bungholio: Lord of The Harvest (aka Halloween Special) : An evening of trick-or-treating takes a strange turn when Beavis becomes the Great Cornholio.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Canned : Todd helps Beavis & Butthead on their quest to shake up a can of soda found by the side of the highway.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Friday Night : Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Bad Dog : Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Nose Bleed : Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Through A Lens Darkly : After a nearly disastrous driving lesson, Daria debates whether to switch from glasses to contacts, and Kevin experiments with a new accessory.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Old and the Beautiful : When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Depth Takes a Holiday : Daria is approached by two imaginary friends to get Christmas, Halloween, and Guy Fawkes Day to return to Holiday Island, and Helen and Jake get struck by Cupid's arrow.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria Dance Party : Brittany and Kevin get into a heated fight, Sandi baits Quinn into organizing the school dance, and Jodie gives Brittany relationship advice.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Lost Girls : The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: It Happened One Nut : Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria! : As a hurricane approaches Lawndale, the town's residents spontaneously break into song, and Daria, Jane, Brittany, and Kevin are forced to brace the storm together.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Lane Miserables : When Jane's family members all come home at once, she and Trent temporarily move into Daria's house, Helen and Jake pick Jane's brain, and Daria imagines a future with Trent.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jake Of Hearts : Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Speedtrapped : Jake and Helen take off on a marriage seminar, and Daria and Quinn take a road trip to bail out Jane and Mystik Spiral.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Lawndale File : Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Just Add Water : Lawndale High's students and faculty members must swim for their lives after attending a mandatory casino night on the Princess Fairy luxury liner.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jane's Addition : Trent agrees to help Jane and Daria on their multimedia project, and Daria feels threatened when Jane falls for a guy named Tom.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Partner's Complaint : Daria and Jane team up with different partners on an economics project after new tensions over Tom put a rift between them.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Anti-Social Climbers : Daria's class is caught in a snowstorm while on a field trip to the mountains, and Jake and Helen try to reignite intimacy in their relationship.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: A Tree Grows In Lawndale : Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Murder, She Snored : Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The F Word : While trying to be a conformist for an assignment, Jane is selected by the cheerleaders to replace Brittany on the squad.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: I Loathe A Parade : During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Of Human Bonding : Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Disaster City : Mike visits Disaster City to train with first responders in preparation for any sort of global catastrophe.

programme.desc: Whooping Crane : Mike visits a wild life and research institute with the some abnormal methods for saving endangered birds.

programme.desc: Le Reve : Mike witnesses the back stage magic at one of the biggest shows in Las Vegas and meets the man responsible for it all.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Hair Museum + Dog Colorist : Mike visits a museum dedicated to hair and its charming curator. Then Mike meets a hairstylist who has found the perfect canvas is man’s best friend.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 1 : In this third season, a group of men and a group of women are abandoned on the opposite side of the same island. Neither knows the other is there. Will these two small groups survive - and what will happen when they meet?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 2 : The women catch sight of a man in the distance, and when they go to investigate the two groups finally meet. But as a vicious tropical storm rolls in, the thunder and lightning have a devastating effect on amputee and war veteran Hannah.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 3 : Marooned for ten days, the islanders now face starvation. They battle dangerous ocean currents to set fishing nets. Rob develops a tooth abscess, and endures primitive surgery on the beach. And flickers of romance begin.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 4 : Tempers reach fever pitch when Tilly turns on Erika. Dan leads an expedition for food around the rocky coastline. With the tide coming in he must make a difficult decision: do they turn back or risk their lives crossing one last perilous set of rocks?

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials
programme.desc: Distilleries : Produced in Scotland and the American South, whiskey is popular, has a colorful history, and is one of the world's oldest drinks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Military Movers : The United States Transportation Command, answering to the Department of Defense, runs military transport like an efficient private shipping and travel agency; from the Civil War to US Transcom, track the development of military logistics.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Presidential Movers : The vehicles that transport the President of the United States aren't your ordinary planes, trains, and automobiles: they are top-secret; and for your Average Joe, there's only two ways to find out what they're really like inside.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Toys : A look at five categories of boys' toys and what relationship they have had on the development of young minds; Super Soaker water gun; Lionel electric train; Erector Set; cap gun; Lincoln Logs; Matchbox Cars; G.I. Joe; LEGO bricks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Electric Light : Thomas Edison announces plans for the central lighting of New York before an electrical system exists or electric light is invented.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adventure Machines : Adrenaline runs high when Adam Richman visits the factory where Yamaha makes ATVs, WaveRunners and more; an inside look at a company built to get people sky-high in paramotors; amusement park Diggerland USA; mech-suits; submarine built for two.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Weird Machines : Some machines built for sheer spectacle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear Subs : Nuclear submarines carry more firepower than all bombs dropped in history; since the 1950s, these steel vessels became U.S. defense cornerstones, sparking Cold War underwater competition and creating engineering miracles for deterrence.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear Tech : Nuclear research ranges from well-known applications, such as bombs and reactors, to little-known uses in medicine, food preparation, and radiation detection. It's also spawned ancillary technologies to store nuclear waste and clean up accidents.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Most Dangerous : The most dangerous snakes, sports, weather events; America's most dangerous volcano; tornado hazards; base jumping.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Most Shocking : It strikes without warning and kills in an instant; we fear its might even as we use it to save a life; explore the electric shock in its numerous forms.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Enter the Dragon Part 1 : Po and the Furious Five meet their greatest challenge yet: a supernatural creature who is invincible to the powers of kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Enter the Dragon Part 2 : Po and the Furious Five meet their greatest challenge yet: a supernatural creature who is invincible to the powers of kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Mama Told Me not to Kung Fu : Crane's mom visits the Valley of Peace. Crane reveals to Po that his mom hates Kung Fu so he promised her that he would never have anything to do with it. Crane asks Po and the others to help him keep his secret from his mom.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Eternal Chord : Po's qi is out of balance. He and his friends attempt to re-harmonize the panda using the tradition of musical kung fu. They better work fast, as only Po can stop the destruction of the Eternal Chord and un-creating the universe.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Apocalypse Yao : Po has to help Master Yao after Taotie and Bian Zao steal the Mystic Secrets of Kung Fu right out of the master's head.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Crazy Little Ling Called Love : Shifu's evil ex-girlfriend Mei Ling is back...and back together with Shifu! Dubious Po must find out if she is on the level or just using Shifu for her own criminal gain.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Real Dragon Warrior : Po and Monkey discover a small village and meet an impostor claiming to be the Dragon Warrior. Po is determined to expose the fraud but could end up doing more harm than good.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The First Five : When Po throws a party and invites the First Furious Five to attend, everyone is shocked to learn that Shifu may not be the courageous hero that they thought he was.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Youth in Re-Volt : After Bian Zao steals magical lightning powers, he snubs his villain father Taotie and instead teams up with the vicious Tong Fo and the Croc Bandits. Will Po and Taotie knock some sense into Bian Zao before he uses his powers to destroy the village?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: See No Weevil : General Tsin is back with a crazy conspiracy theory about alien rice weevils trying to take over the world. When Po learns Tsin is telling the truth, it's up to the Kung Fu Panda to stop the invasion before it's too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Goose Chase : After Zeng unhappily quits his job at the Jade Palace, Po cheers up the weepy goose by telling him he could be a kung fu master. Bad idea, Po. Bad idea.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Face Full of Fear : With his childhood bully back in town, Po must learn to face his fear or risk losing his Dragon Warrior mojo and those that are most important to him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Forsaken and Furious : Tired of Po getting all the credit and acclaim, the Furious Five quit the Jade Palace and strike out on their own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Camp Ping : It's a battle between master and father when Shifu and Mr. Ping compete for Po's attention and affection during a camping trip. But will their competition get in the way of Po defeating the Valley's newest menace?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po the Croc : After a blow to the head leaves Po with amnesia, Fung and the Croc Bandits are more than happy to use it to their advantage...by convincing the Dragon Warrior that he is their evil bandit leader.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Welcome to Area Fifty-Something : All is well at Area Fifty-Something with Team Monster, until a lone alien imprisons the President and makes a permanent home on base.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Danger Wears a Diaper/The Toy From Another World : The president's birthday is here! Dr. C has made him a gadget that will make him appear younger, but instead blasts him to infanthood!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Bath Effect/The Fruit of All Evil : Susan makes B.O.B. think that baths cure crankiness - B.O.B. leaps into action, chasing after Coverton to cure his crankiness once and for all!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Frenemy Mine/Maximum B.O.B. : B.O.B. is determined to have Coverton be his emergency buddy. Instead, Coverton chooses to manipulate B.O.B. at a time when he needs him the most.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Came...On a Field Trip/Educational Television : The Monsters find an alien in the woods doing an earth studies project, which has a lot of sensitive data that could be used for an invasion!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Flipped Out/The Wormhole Has Turned : B.O.B. discovers a secret switch that General Monger tells him not to touch. Will it get rewired before the Big Blue Blob can get to flip it?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Two Faces of Dr. Cockroach/The Thing With One Brain : Dr. C is split into two through his new teleportation machine. Can the Monsters reunite the wild and brainy roaches before it's too late?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Night of the Living Dog/Attack of the Movie Night : Sqweep fashions a canine brainwave device to make B.O.B. the perfect pet. It works great on everyone on the base but B.O.B.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: 98 Pound Cockroach/When Nature Shrieks : Dr. C doubles his strength, but lessens his genius. Can the other Monsters save him before it's too late?

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Screaming Your Calls/The Time-Out That Wouldn't End : When Dr. C invents a "living" smart-phone, Coverton diabolically plans to use the smart-phone to hack the base's mainframe.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Got Out of Hand/The Sound of Fear : It's April Fool's Day at Area Fifty-Something as Susan tries to prevent the Monsters from destroying the base with a prank! Dr. C's "Ph.D" is in jeopardy as a former teacher reveals a missing music grade in his transcript.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Vornicarn : A new alien, Sta'abi, comes to Earth in search of a ferocious beast called Vornicarn. Soon, everyone is on a chase in order to save the planet from Vornicarn's terror!

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Sorry Syndrome/Speak Not the Q Word : Susan is in a bind after spilling food on Sta'abi and apologizing about it. Insulted, Sta'abi hunts Susan to feed her "fralnick" to Vornicarn.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: It Came From Channel 5/It Ruled with an Iron Fist : Strange secrets begin to unfold when Derek returns to expose our friends at Area Fifty Something. Monger is away for the weekend! This is great news for Team Monster and Team Alien until they're introduced to Rule-Bot.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Driven to Madness/The Beast From 20,000 Gallons : Link and Sta'abi duel for driving privileges of a new supercar. Sqweep wants to drive too though, and takes off on a supersonic joyride.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The Sneezing Horror/Prisoner of the Dark Dimension : With everyone down with alien flu, Coverton tries to steal base secrets, but fails to account for a huge gelatinous hallucinating B.O.B. Vornicarn's bad behavior lands him in the Isolation Zone.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: I Predict Horror/Destroy Chickie D! : B.O.B. eats Dr. C's "probabilitator" and foresees Coverton with a crown, but soon Coverton discovers the painful truth about his future.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Number Seven!/The Friend Who Wasn't There : Sqweep has to go "number seven". Team Monster fears the destruction it will cause and sets out to contain it! Link pursues Sta'abi using a pheromone spray of Sqweep's design that ends up having unforeseen consequences.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: No Wrist, No Reward : The coaches face off in their first Grudge Match to keep their team safe from elimination, and the artists test their knack for consistency with wristband tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: That's Gonna Leave A Mark : A Flash Challenge using electrical tape tests the teams' creativity, and the artists face challenging placements on their canvases during the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fight Your Own Battles : Christian and Cleen's artists work with their teammates in a tag-team tattoo on a single canvas, and one coach puts two of his artists on the chopping block.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Ink Will Speak for Itself : Nine men and nine women kick off an epic battle of the sexes by going head to head in a team collaboration tattoo to prove they have what it takes to be the next Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: A Storm is Brewin' : The judges unveil a new twist and bring in heavy-hitting veterans Joey Hamilton and Ryan Ashley to coach the teams, whose black-and-gray shading skills are put to the test.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Down to the Wire : Two-time veterans Bubba Irwin and Sarah Miller return to coach the men's and women's teams, and the artists showcase their knack for legibility by inking surrealistic tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Hunter & the Hunted : Cam's arrogant behavior continues to irritate his team members during a color contrast challenge, and the gang bands together to sabotage Cam's standing in the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Art Stands Alone : It's every man and woman for themselves when the artists tattoo any design in any style before a blind critique from the judges.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Art of War : In a test of consistency, the teams must engrave full suits of armor, then a cross-stitch style elimination tattoo throws all the artists for a loop.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Sabotage : The artists go head-to-head in a test of technical application, and the losers fight for their survival in an elimination tattoo challenge dictated by the victors.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pins & No Needles : The artists think outside the box as they show their understanding of color theory, then get a crash course in new school style from their coaches Jime Litwalk and Kelly Doty.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Drawing Alliances : Composition must be perfect as the remaining competitors draw freehand tattoos on their canvases, and coaches James Vaughn and Megan Jean Morris offer the artists advice.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: By Accident or By Design : Every decision counts as the artists choose someone else's tattoo design and make it their own in a true test of adaptability.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Roll of the Dice : As the women's team plots to dismantle the men's team, the judges unveil a combination of detail design and cover-up challenges that are helmed by two domineering coaches.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Put Your Ink Where Your Mouth Is : With only seven competitors remaining, the canvases hold all the power as the artists are challenged to out-market their rivals and work outside their creative comfort zones.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Moving Pictures : The artists paint custom wheelchair spoke guards in the flash challenge and show finesse as they take on difficult back-of-the-neck tattoos in the elimination tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Unfriendly Fire : The final five artists are tasked with creating murals using paintball guns, then must work across disciplines in a traditional illustrative portrait elimination challenge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Step Up or Shut Up : To earn a spot in the finale, the final four artists endure a grueling, blind-judged tattoo marathon and then endeavor to reinterpret a rival's best work.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Battle of the Sexes Finale : Seven coaches compete in the Clash of the Coaches Face-Off, the final three artists unveil their 35-hour back pieces, and one artist wins $100,000 and the Ink Master title.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Downey's and Out : In order to save a failing Irish pub in Philadelphia, Jon must reinvigorate its owner, who was once a star chef.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Swanky Troubles : Jon must deal with a sprawling menu, a bad layout, and a womanizing co-owner if he hopes to save Swanky Bubbles, a dysfunctional champagne bar in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chumps : Jon must get a lenient bar owner to reign in his raucous over-pouring bartenders if he is going to save a dated Burbank, CA, sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Mystique or Murder? : After a fatal club shooting, Jon must work to rehabilitate the reputation of the Mystique Lounge in West Palm Beach, FL.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Weber's of Lies : To save Weber's Place, Jon must stamp out a culture of theft among the staff and get the bar's owner to start giving a damn.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bikini Bust : Feuding bikini-clad bartenders wreak havoc on a California sports bar where the owner is more focused on partying than running a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Turtle on Its Back : Jon heads to Bourbon Street to help the owner of Turtle Bay figure out how to make his bar stand out in one of the most popular drinking districts in the world.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bro's Got to Geaux! : TJ Quills has a troublesome reputation for serving minors, which can only be resolved if Jon is able to convince the owner to give up his frat boy ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Rock 'n' Roaches : A roach infestation is just one of many problems Jon must face in order to save Headhunters, a fetish-themed tiki bar and music venue in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Tears for Beers : A bar and a marriage are on the line as Jon helps owners Tim and Sara save The Brixton, which is rapidly driving the couple into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Empty Pockets : When tasked with rescuing an immigrant-owned pool hall in Denver, Jon finds the biggest obstacle is the owner's pride.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon T, He Don't Like It : Jon must help the owner of The Kasbah in Aurora, CO, find a less rowdy clientele if he's going to save the once-thriving urban hot spot.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Pinch : Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Karaoke Katastrophe : A hostile chef and a lascivious owner complicate Jon's efforts to save Dimples, America's oldest karaoke bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Horse Walks Into a Bar : Owners Scott and Donna face foreclosure if Jon is unable to rescue Kid Chilleen's Badass BBQ by evicting the bar's equine and biker visitors.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Play. Some. Janet. Jackson! : Jon must correct the behavior of a drunk and verbally abusive owner if he's going to save the historic Gipsy, Las Vegas's first gay nightclub.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Beer and Loathing in Las Vegas : Chefs and best friends Christ and Mitch decided to open The Hammer in Las Vegas to cater to locals, but then a case of pneumonia caused everything to fall apart.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: There's No Crying in the Bar Business : Jon must restore trust between owners and curb rampant theft among employees to save Barlow's, a failing Georgia sports bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Characters Assassination : Jon must help a Yankee family learn to do business in the South if he hopes to save the poorly themed Characters Quarters in North Carolina.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Don't Judge a Booze by Its Bottle : Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Soup Contest : A nouveau riche hillbilly family moves to Beverly Hills and shakes up the privileged society with their hayseed ways.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Badger Game : A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Badger Returns : Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Soup Contest : A nouveau riche hillbilly family moves to Beverly Hills and shakes up the privileged society with their hayseed ways.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Badger Game : A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Badger Returns : Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Gorilla : Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Come Back Little Herby : The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed In Politics : Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Joins The Board : Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Woodchucks : Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Christmas Present : In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Flying Saucer : Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny Retires : Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampett Curse : Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Indians Are Coming : When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly Comes Out : After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Gypsy's Warning : The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: His Royal Highness : The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Super Hawg : The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Little Monster : Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Inherits A Castle : Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampetts In London : The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampett Castle : The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Greetings From The President : When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Army Game : Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Plot For Granny : Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's Military Career : Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Reserve Program : Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro In The Reserve : Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Seconds… : Alec's mother is shot. Kiera must decide how far she will go to stop Julian's murderous future.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Road Not Taken : While investigating a disturbing case of a woman who apparently spontaneously combusted, Olivia is plagued with waking dreams, seeing elaborate visions of things not really there.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: There's More Than One of Everything : In the season finale, the Fringe Division is attacked, Mr. Jones returns, Walter disappears and Massive Dynamics' elusive William Bell (LEONARD NIMOY) is finally introduced.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: A New Day in the Old Town : In the second season premiere, Olivia returns to William Bell's intriguing parallel universe, while Peter, unknowingly in a race against time, pursues information about her visit.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Night of Desirable Objects : As the circumstances surrounding Olivia intensify, the Fringe team investigates a perplexing case involving genetic mutation.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Fracture : Unexplained bombs put innocent lives on the line and the FBI's Fringe Team in a race against time to defuse the mysterious threat.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Momentum Deferred : Recuperating from her alternate reality meeting with William Bell (LEONARD NIMOY), Olivia consumes a powerful "fringe" concoction that Walter prescribes to stimulate her memory.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Dream Logic : As the Fringe team tirelessly explores a mysterious incident involving a man whose strange and creepy dreams project nightmarish events, Agent Broyles has a meeting with Nina Sharp.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Earthling : A shadowy case casts light on Agent Broyles' past and leads the team to the possibility of foreign Fringe Science — as alarming events mount and details emerge about Broyles.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Of Human Action : A disconcerting kidnapping rapidly escalates into a hostage situation in New York, as the Fringe Division discovers a mysterious force with mind-blowing consequences.

programme.title: Fringe

programme.desc: Second Last : Kiera and Carlos must stop Travis after he gets his hands on a second CPS suit.
