programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, together in `La La Land', as well as actor and director Ben Affleck and British star Sienna Miller together in the crime film `Live By Night'. Plus, music from Gregory Porter.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's sofa are Warren Beatty talking about `Rules Don't Apply', Miranda Hart starring in `Annie', Keeley Hawes in TV series `The Durrells', and Peter Capaldi discusses his decision to leave `Doctor Who'. Plus, music from Jennifer Hudson.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa tonight: double Oscar-nominated actress Brenda Blethyn; comic actor Stephen Mangan, starring in new movie `Postman Pat'; iconic fashion designer Jean Paul Gaultier; and the musical legend that is Barry Manilow.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are `X-Men' star James McAvoy with his co-star Sarah Paulson, iconic star of `Withnail and I' Richard E Grant, and Steve Coogan and John C Reilly. Also featuring music from Westlife.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Batman Extra : Graham is joined by the stars of `Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice' in a special edition of the talk show. On the sofa are Batman himself, Ben Affleck, his alien adversary Superman, Henry Cavill, and Amy Adams, playing Lois Lane.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Will Smith, Margot Robbie, Hugh Jackman, David Beckham and Noel Gallagher : Graham is joined by David Beckham, Will Smith, Margot Robbie, Hugh Jackman and Noel Gallagher who performs his new single.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests include Saoirse Ronan, Oscar-nominated for her role in `Lady Bird', Eric McCormack and Debra Messing, reunited in the new series of `Will and Grace', comedian Rob Beckett, host of `All Together Now', and Keala Settle who performs `This Is Me'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Oscar-winner Denzel Washington appearing in `Fences', Fifty Shades star Jamie Dornan, Keanu Reeves starring in `John Wick: Chapter 2', legendary comedian and actress Whoopi Goldberg, and music from Rag'n'Bone Man.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Reynolds and Josh Brolin, who star together in irreverent superhero sequel `Deadpool 2'. Plus, David Beckham, BAFTA-nominated actor Vanessa Kirby, and music legend Joan Armatrading.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: On Graham's festive sofa are: football legend David Beckham, from `Star Wars: The Force Awakens', Princess Leia herself Carrie Fisher and new stars Daisy Ridley and John Boyega, and pop superstar Kylie Minogue, who chats and sings.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Ricky Gervais, Rebel Wilson, Danny Dyer, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz and Usher : Graham is joined by Ben Stiller, Ricky Gervais, Rebel Wilson, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz, Danny Dyer and Usher.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa are Chris Hemsworth and Oscar-nominated Jessica Chastain, co-starring in `The Hunstman: Winter's War', `Spiderman' star Kirsten Dunst, promoting new sci-fi movie `Midnight Special', and comic Brit actor Stephen Mangan.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham Norton is joined by American politician Hillary Clinton, who discusses `What Happened', actor Jeff Goldblum, who is in `Thor: Ragnarok', actor Gerard Butler, who is in `Geostorm', and comedian Jack Whitehall. Plus music from Gregory Porter.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests on Graham's sofa include Hollywood stars Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, and Jeff Goldblum, as well as British actress Thandie Newton. Plus, music from former Scissor Sister Jake Shears, who performs `Creep City'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Ant & Dec, Jamie Dornan, Aaron Paul, Naomi Campbell and Ellie Goulding : Joining Graham on the sofa are Jamie Dornan, Julie Walters, Stephen Mangan, and musical guests Charli XCX and Rita Ora.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are comic actor Stephen Mangan from new TV show `Hang Ups', and music from Jess Glynne, who performs her new single `I'll Be There'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: New Year's Eve Show : Joining Graham are Jennifer Lawrence, Eddie Redmayne, Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg and Years and Years.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by Kit Harington, Matt LeBlanc, Rebel Wilson and Mumford and Sons.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are `Game of Thrones' star Emilia Clarke, pop icon Gloria Estefan, star of `Broadchurch' David Tennant, and the irrepressible Miriam Margolyes. Also, Leon Bridges performs the new single `Beyond'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined on the sofa by actor Zac Efron, comic actor Seth Rogen and `Friends' star Matt LeBlanc.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Sir Michael Caine, Hollywood star Chris Pine, actor Rami Malek and double Oscar-winner Sally Field. Also featuring music from Christine and the Queens who perform their current single `5 Dollars'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa are star of stage and screen Sir Patrick Stewart, comedy genius Ricky Gervais, Oscar-nominated actress Regina King, director and actor Chiwetel Ejiofor, plus music from Jack Savoretti, performing `Candlelight'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa this time are Hollywood star Paul Rudd, playing Ant-Man in `Captain America: Civil War', with `Sherlock' and `Hobbit' star Martin Freeman and comic actor Seth Rogen, starring in `Bad Neighbours 2'.

programme.desc: Ethics : Loyalty and ethics clash when a paralyzed Worf asks to help him commit suicide.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Cause and Effect : The Enterprise is trapped in a time warp that forces the crew to endlessly repeat the same experiences.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Suspicions : A pioneering Ferengi scientist Is found dead, and Beverly risks her career to prove he was murdered.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Attached : Imprisoned and telepathically joined by an alien race, Picard and Beverly are forced to face the feelings they have always had for each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: All Good Things Pt-1 & Pt-2 : Picard finds himself travelling between the past, present, and future while attempting to prevent the destruction of humanity... by his own actions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: First Contact : Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Galaxy's Child : While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Night Terrors : The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Identity Crisis : Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge and an old friend fight to defeat a parasite that is trying to transform them into another species.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Nth Degree : When assigned to investigate an unknown probe, Lt. Barclay is electrocuted through a shuttlecraft's computer, where he receives an unexplainable boost of confidence and a vast increase in his knowledge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Qpid : The Enterprise is at Tegus 3, to host the Federation archaeologists council's annual symposium, where Picard is to give the key-note lecture on its enigmatic ruins, now forbidden to outsiders.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Drumhead : A retired admiral boards the Enterprise in an effort to determine the actions aboard the ship surrounding an act of sabotage and possible treason.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Lights Of Zetar : The Enterprise must deal with incorporeal cloud-like aliens who have already destroyed the inhabitants of a library planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Requiem For Methuselah : While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Way To Eden : The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Forced To Be A Father : Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Headline Horror Stories : With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Ex-Wife Claims I Molested Our Daughter Who Ran Off With Her Boyfriend Pt. 2 : Gina asked Dr. Phil for help with her daughter Alexis, saying she was kidnapped by her survivalist boyfriend David. As the story unfolds, another layer surfaces, allegations of molestation by a family member. Find out who, and will a polygraph tell all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meddling Moms : They track your every move and monitor your conversations. This may sound like the latest GPS locator, but they are actually meddling moms!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Banned From The Wedding : A bride-to-be takes on her future mother-in-law in an ugly feud that has torn a family apart. Can Dr. Phil cut through the drama and broker some peace for this family?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Husband's Shocking Confession Pt. 2 : Michelle thought she had a perfect marriage until Wade admitted to keeping a horrible secret from his wife. Little did she know this one revelation would be the tip of the iceberg. Dr. Phil continues the startling story of Wade and Michelle. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At War With My Teen : What happens when a household is in total meltdown and filled with constant battles? Meet a mother who is afraid of her 17-year-old son and the stepfather who says he's caught in the middle. But is the boy the only one to blame for the chaos in the house?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mind Control : It's hard to believe, but in America alone, there may be as many as 5,000 religious groups preying upon the weak and vulnerable, and all in the name of God. Dr. Phil's guests have warnings for you and your children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Whatever Happened To...(Most Talked About Guests) : Do you ever wonder how your favorite Dr. Phil guest is faring since being on the show? Dr. Phil follows up with some of his most talked about guests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Behind The Headlines: The Disappearance Of Caylee Anthony : Caylee Anthony's mom, Casey Anthony, has been named a person of interest in the case of the missing 3-year-old. Many fear the worst has happened. Dr. Phil examines the psychological aspects of the story that continues to grip America's imagination.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Family Drama : Family squabbles are hard to avoid -- especially during the holidays -- but what happens when that behavior escalates to cursing, yelling, and even physical attacks? Dr. Phil sits down with a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Honeymoon Hangover : Are you newlyweds suffering Honeymoon Hangover? The Bahamas vacation is over, the dress is put away and couples realize they now have this to face: Married Life. Dr. Phil discovers how little couples know about each other before they walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For Better Or Worse : Some couples vow "for better or worse." With a 50% divorce rate in America, in the midst of marital crises ranging from separation to unfaithfulness, Dr. Phil helps manage rocky marriages. Dr.Phil tells how to survive infidelity or when to call it quits.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marriage Crisis: Drowning In Debt : Money is the number one reason why couples say they get divorced. The country's current financial crisis has resulted in more couples getting buried in a landslide of debt which takes its toll on a marriage. Is your marriage on the rocks because of debt?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Make It Or Break It : Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Affairs Of The Heart : Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Risky Teen Behavior : How well do you know your teenager? Could your child be participating in risky or illegal activities right under your own roof?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Love Triangle : A recent study shows that the number of men and women having extramarital affairs is on the rise. Could your spouse be cheating on you? Dr. Phil's guests are struggling with the aftermath of infidelity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Husband's Double Life : Are you ignoring warning signs in your relationship? Is there something concerning you that you haven't addressed? Dr. Phil warns his viewers: Don't think your problems will go away once you walk down the aisle, face the issues now before it's too late!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Forced To Be A Father : Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.desc: With things looking good for Sam and Georgia, some of the islanders question Mike and Tyla's relationship. Camilla and Jamie talk about their future.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: A Twitter challenge causes drama in the villa as truths are revealed. Jamie and Camilla get even closer. The results of the latest public vote are announced.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: A new summer of love starts tonight as Caroline Flack welcomes 2019's line up of young singles to the Love Island villa. Iain Stirling also returns as show narrator with his inimitable take on all the island action.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The second week continues and the islanders are already experiencing a summer they'll never forget. But as ever, there are plenty of twists and turns for them, and with £50,000 up for grabs for the winners, everybody's in it for the long haul.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature's rising and there are plenty more surprises in store. As ever, nothing is quite what it seems in paradise. And with that cash prize of £50,000 up for grabs for the winning couple in seven weeks' time, everyone wants to couple up.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature just keeps on rising in paradise. Our gorgeous young things are having an absolute blast, but some are coupling while others are in danger of being dumped. Right now - nobody wants to go home.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the end of week two and the islanders are having the time of their lives, but as the love games continue, no-one knows what's waiting around the next corner. And with just one couple in with a chance of winning, the battle to stay is on.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : It's time for another feast of unseen moments from the villa. All the flirting, fun, romance and juiciest gossip is waiting right here, along with a recap of all the big stories and the best moments of the week.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Week three on `Love Island' is under way, and the temperature is rising yet again. For the cast of gorgeous islanders, it's already been a summer they'll never forget. But with a 50,000 pound prize awaiting our winning couple, can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week three on `Love Island' and the islanders are soaking up the sunshine in their very own luxury villa. It just doesn't get better than this, but behind the flirting and romance, who's for real and who's just playing the game?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are having the time of their lives as they flirt and frolic in the Spanish sunshine, but they all know that only one couple will have the chance of walking away with the 50,000 pound prize.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are having the time of their lives as they flirt and frolic in the Spanish sunshine, but they all know that only one couple will have the chance of walking away with the 50,000 pound prize.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week three on `Love Island' and our gorgeous guys and girls are definitely making the most of their unforgettable summer in paradise. But while the sun keeps on shining, the twists and turns just keep on coming.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Things are getting hotter by the day on 'Love Island'. While the islanders are enjoying the summer of a lifetime, they all know there are plenty more surprises in store.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's been a turbulent third week in the villa and there are plenty more surprises in store for the islanders. It might look like paradise, but `Love Island' life is always a challenge.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : It's that time again so strap yourselves in for another jam-packed hour of exclusive unseen moments and all the big stories from the villa. What a seven days it has been, featuring gossip, drama, fun, flirting and romance galore.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week four in paradise as the islanders continue to enjoy their summer. There are plenty more surprises in store, and while they might have arrived dreaming of romance, that £50,000 prize means that not everyone may be in this for love.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature is rising with every passing day. In the villa, one thing the islanders know by now is to expect the unexpected, and the surprises come thick and fast. It's impossible to tell who's really looking for love and who is playing the game.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week four on Love Island and the islanders are enjoying a summer none of them will ever forget, and all those twists and turns are guaranteed to keep them on their toes. One thing's for sure, nobody wants to go home at this stage.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Black Jet : Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Silent Service : Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: King of the Greenie Board : Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Drop Zone : Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Overdue And Presumed Lost : A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Real Deal Seal : Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A Separate Peace, Part I : RAdm. Boone has become nominated to serve as ComSixthFleet and to get his third star. Days before the Senate confirmation hearing, SecNav receives an anonymous hotline tip alleging war crimes in Vietnam by Boone; Harm and Mac investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Colonel's Wife : Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mishap : "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Into the Breech : Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: People V. Gunny : Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.desc: Queen Pin : Sam assumes a former alias in a risky undercover operation to take down an elusive drug lord; Hetty interrupts Callen and Anna's romantic night to assign them a mission to escort a prisoner.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Getaway : Nell and Eric go under cover to track a tech-savvy husband and wife linked to the hacking of the U.S. Treasury Department.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: 767 : Callen and Sam go under cover to track an engineer attempting to sell classified information; Deeks plans a surprise for Kensi and her friends.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: From Havana With Love : The team investigates when a defense contractor designing a nuclear attack weapon is suspected, by her husband, of selling Navy secrets to a foreign government.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Battle Scars : The NCIS team must work with Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues after a highly decorated Navy captain kidnaps a Veterans Affairs administrator who has been siphoning funds.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Golden Days : The NCIS team works with Hetty's former Vietnam War colleagues, A.J. Chegwidden, Sterling Bridges and Charles Langston, on a gold heist investigation.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Uncaged : When Sam's wife, Michelle, is taken from her home, the kidnappers demand that Sam's arch nemesis, Tahir Khaled, be released from prison in exchange for Michelle's whereabouts.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Unleashed : Sam Hanna goes rogue from the NCIS team in an attempt to stop Tahir Khaled from ever targeting his family again.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Party Crashers : When Hetty turns in retirement papers and disappears, Shay Mosley comes to Los Angeles to oversee the team and makes staffing changes; Sam insists that Callen find a new partner.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Se Murio El Payaso : When the daughter of a notorious counterfeiter arrives in Los Angeles, Sam goes under cover as a financier; Callen partners with Anna to track the family's latest scheme.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Assets : During the murder investigation of a Navy Lieutenant on leave in Los Angeles, the team uncovers classified surveillance briefs she smuggled into the city that may have been sold to a foreign buyer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Plain Sight : When weapons worth $1 million are stolen, the team tracks the evidence to a charity event; Mosley gets herself added to the event's guest list, bringing Callen and Sam along as her security detail.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Mountebank : Sam goes under cover as a day trader after an investment banker who has ties to Russia is murdered; one of Callen's aliases is the victim of credit card theft.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Can I Get A Witness? : LAPD Detective Whiting calls in a favor when Deeks' former partner goes rogue.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Silo : Kensi is transported to a missile launch facility to help thwart a takeover of nuclear weapons.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Promotions, Podcasts and Magic Tea : Darlene earns a promotion at Wellman Plastics, while Ben decides on a new career path; Jackie tries an herbal tea. and it leads to an emotional revelation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sex, Lies and House Hunting : Darlene loves the house she's looking at, but when the realtor says she has a chance of getting the house if she's part of a couple, she convinces Ben to pretend to be her partner.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Triggered : The family is locked down in their home due to a shooting incident in the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Messy Situation, Miscommunication and Academic Probation : When Becky outs her relationship with Professor Davis, it's his erratic behavior that sends Becky down a path to reevaluate their relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Gas Pump, House Dump and Stew Volcano : Darlene searches for a home that she and Becky can afford; after an attempt to boost business at The Lunch Box goes awry.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Big Negotiations and Broken Expectations : Dan enlists the help of a few friends for the funeral-home remodel; Louise points out that Dan's generosity with his time benefits everyone but her.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Best Laid Plans, a Contrabassoon and a Sinking Feeling : Darlene struggles to cope with the stress of construction; Lou returns as Mark's combative contrabassoon teacher.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Ring Circus : Ben and Darlene are excited to share their good news with the family, but Neville and Jackie, and Aldo and Harris, share their own very similar news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Judge and a Priest Walk Into a Living Room… : The Conners gear up for a megawedding; Jackie & Neville, Darlene & Ben, Harris & Aldo are planning for a big day, but discover that some of the couples may not be on the same page.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Double Honeymoon and Seeing Double : In an effort to save money, Darlene and Ben, and Jackie and Neville head off on their joint honeymoon, where their cost-saving measures contribute to a tension-filled getaway.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Scenes From Two Marriages: The Parrot Doth Protest Too Much : When Jackie moves in with Neville, he shows up to their home with an excess of animals from his vet office; Darlene and Ben argue Darlene is turning into her father.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Driving, Dating and Deceit : Mark is anxious to get his driver's license; Darlene attempts to teach Mark to drive, but her frantic energy sends him running to Ben for help; Harris meets a new guy online.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Parent Traps and Heart Attacks : When a relative passes away unexpectedly, the family must debate about who should gain custody of a jaded nephew, who is just shy of his 18th birthday.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Little Weed and A Bad Seed : Problems arise on Beverly Rose's first day of kindergarten; Becky and Darlene have a disagreement; Harris advises an unusual solution for Dan's back pain.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Book Bands and Guillotine Hands : The Conners grapple with parenthood, dating, financial pressures, aging and in-laws in working-class America.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Take This Job and Shove It Twice : Darlene receives a promotion, but she quickly learns the fancy title is not all it's cracked up to be; when Louise loses her job at Casita Bonita, an opportunity arises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Of Missing Minds and Missing Fries : Jackie must come to terms with her mother becoming ill; Darlene's job hunt proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Crumbs and Couch Surferes : Darlene, Ben, Becky and Beverly Rose move into the new house, where Darlene implements a new set of rules.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Dog Days of Christmas : Dan meets his in-laws for the first time when Louise's family comes to visit; Darlene helps Becky with a parenting problem.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two More Years and A Stolen Rose : The death of a beloved teacher from Dan and Jackie's high school brings old classmates together; Becky asks Darlene and Ben for a big favour.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Stuck in the Middle and Stuck in the Past : Darlene and Ben get into a fight and ignore Becky's boundaries in the house; Dan accuses Jackie of losing all of their home videos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: New Pipes and Old Secrets : Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Adding Insult to Injury : Darlene continues her search for a new job; Becky is desperate to spend more time with Beverly Rose.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Possums, Pregnancy and Patriarchy : Harris makes a big announcement; Ben is overwhelmed with family responsibilities.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hiding In and Moving Out : Harris takes her anger out on Darlene; Dan and Louise spend an entire day in bed together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Contra Hearings and the Midnight Gambler : Mark fights for a spot in the Lanford High chamber orchestra; Jackie puts a lottery machine in the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Road Trip and Guilt Trip : Dan and Jackie take a road trip to a hardware wholesaler in Oklahoma; Darlene heads out of town and leaves behind a plethora of to-do notes for Becky and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Text Thread and Marrital Bed : Louise gets into a feud with Becky after accidentally sending a rude message in the family text thread; Darlene tries to spice up her sex life with Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: What's So Funny About Peas, Love and Understanding? : Darlene figures out a new plan to afford Mark's college tuition; Jackie and Louise try to help Becky meet a new guy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dating, Drinking and Grifter Logic : Neville confronts Jackie about loaning Dan money; Darlene attempts to play matchmaker for Mark.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Grad Finale : As Mark's graduation approaches, he considers his relationship with his father; Louise plans a big graduation ceremony at the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Tangled Up in Blue : Darlene is in for one surprise after another when David introduces his girlfriend, Blue (Juliette Lewis), at a parent-teacher conference and mentions that Mark and Harris will be spending the weekend with them.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: All Fired Up! : The Pokémon League is about to begin with the ceremonial lighting of the torch, which carries a flame from the Legendary Pokémon Moltres. Of course, Team Rocket tries to steal it!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Round One – Begin! : It's the first day of the Pokémon League, and when Ash's friends learn his first battle will be held on the Water Field, they're full of advice!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Fire and Ice : As the Pokémon League continues, Ash battles on the Rock Field and has a run-in with Team Rocket after they set up a fake Pokémon Center to lure unwary Trainers!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Wherefore Art Thou, Pokémon? : Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Git Along, Little Pokémon : Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Mystery Menace : In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty Meets Her Match : After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Bound For Trouble : Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Charizard Chills : After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Pokémon Water War : Our heroes’ plans are interrupted by a raging fire in a nearby warehouse. When they try to fight the flames, they quickly find themselves in need of the local fire department: Team Wartortle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Pokémon Food Fight : When Snorlax's Poké Ball breaks, Ash has a huge problem on his hands: How can our heroes get the slumbering Snorlax over a mountain pass to the nearest Pokémon Center?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Pokémon Double Trouble : Ash is anxious to win the final badge of the Orange League, and soon gets a taste of this Gym Leader’s strength as she helps him fend off another Team Rocket sneak attack!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Wacky Watcher : Discovering a scientist’s submarine at sea, our heroes are soon surrounded by his life’s research: a school of splashing Magikarp! They want to help him study Magikarp Evolution, but Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Stun Spore Detour : With Ash and Tracey paralyzed by a wild Vileplume’s Stun Spore, it’s up to Misty to find a local plant and save the day!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Hello Pummelo : With his four Orange League badges in hand, Ash has one last challenge to face before he can be crowned Champion of the Orange League. Does he have what it takes?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Enter The Dragonite : Ash’s battle for the Orange League Winner’s Trophy rages on, and it soon becomes apparent that he will have to take on a powerful Dragonite to become the Orange League Champion!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Viva Las Lapras : Trying to rescue a local school of Lapras from would-be poachers, our heroes must find a way to convince these distrustful Pokémon they are friends...before it’s too late!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: The Underground Round Up : With Pallet Town on their minds, our heroes are searching for a ferry, but soon discover the port is abandoned...except for some explosive Electrode! Can Ash stop Team Rocket before the ferry goes up in smoke?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: A Tent Situation : Ash has an eventful homecoming with a surprise visit from an old friend, a visit to see Professor Oak, and a Team Rocket raid. There’s no place like home!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: A Rivalry Revival : After Gary comes to the rescue against Team Rocket, Ash seizes an opportunity…at long last, our hero gets to challenge his rival to their very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Don’t Touch That ‘Dile : Ash begins his journey in Johto, a region largely unexplored and populated with Pokémon entirely new to him and his friends.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Double Trouble Header : On the road again, Ash and his Charizard soundly defeat an ambitious rookie Trainer named Casey. Upset, she runs away before Ash can comfort her—the perfect time for Team Rocket to strike!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A Sappy Ending : In a forest that's being destroyed by rampaging Pinsir, Ash has to enlist the help of the local Heracross to protect their home! But it turns out these Pokémon look tougher than they act…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Roll on, Pokémon! : On their way to Violet City, our heroes arrive in a valley where Donphan are used to harvest precious stones. Needless to say, the Team Rocket villains aren't far behind them!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Illusion Confusion : The forest can be a scary place at night, especially when you’re lost! Our heroes will need some help to get out of this mess. It's Hoothoot to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Flower Power : On their first stop in a city since New Bark Town, our heroes decide to help an insecure Bellossom dance troupe regain their confidence and perform in an upcoming exhibition!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Spinarak Attack : Ash and the gang arrive in a town besieged by apparent copycat crimes mimicking a legendary master thief. The town’s hopes lie with these young Trainers...how can they stop this criminal duo and their Meowth accomplice?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Snubbull Snobbery : When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Big Horn : When Brock discovers a hurt and frightened Stantler in a nearby park, he decides to nurse it back to health. But with Jessie, James and Meowth on his case, can he keep Stantler safe?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Chikorita Rescue : Still on the road to Violet City, Ash encounters a wild Chikorita and tries to catch it. Chikorita proves to be a tougher opponent than he originally thought, and things only get worse when Team Rocket arrives…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Once In A Blue Moon : Professor Oak’s errand to deliver the mysterious GS Ball to a Poké Ball expert is interrupted when a Quagsire with an eye for round objects steals the GS Ball for a nocturnal ritual…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Whistle Stop : Under yet another Team Rocket ambush, a young Trainer and her Ledyba help our heroes see them off. But, amidst the chaos, her Ledyba get separated from the group—where could they be?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ignorance Is Blissey : Our heroes make a rest stop in a Pokémon Center, which is run by a kind-hearted but misguided Blissey. Things only get worse when an old friend of Blissey's drops in unexpectedly…

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Revved Up : Nick challenges Dan to build a 1969 Camaro Pace Car that can beat the fastest Chevelle that FantomWorks has ever built. Pete’s Mustang Convertible was in three different shops, but it arrives with far more problems than anyone was expecting.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Sole Survivor : Ben wants a partial restoration for his father’s 1962 Maserati, but Dan sees only one solution – turning this heirloom into one of the rarest survivor cars on earth. Raymond and Diane only want one thing for their worn out 1966 bug – perfection.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Things Change : A psychotic patient threatens Abby; Dr. Weaver suspects a woman poisoned her own baby; Dr. Romano continues to make rash judgments.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Sweet Lambo Of Mine : Former Guns & Roses guitarist DJ Ashba arrives at Count's Kustoms in a 2004 Lamborghini Murcielago that he wants turned into the ultimate "mancar".

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Pick Ups and Ponies : Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. He plans to flip it for a big profit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: El Camino Royale : Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Snider's Ride : Dee Snider of Twisted Sister stops by Count's Kustoms to have Danny turn his brand new Tesla into a rock and roller's ride.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Boogie Down Buggy : Danny takes in a dune buggy to trick out in outrageous Count's Kustoms style, and then gets into some seriously higher horse powered fare at the Shelby Heritage Foundation.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Caddylicious : Danny and the team take on a 1967 Caddy for a high end client, but will Ryan and Danny's plan to match the unique interior with a root beer paint job fly, or fizzle?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Lego My Caddy : Danny has big plans for a big client. But will his evil twist on a classic Caddy impress the high rolling buyer, or leave him all out of gas?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Blinged Out Blazer : Danny's got himself a new ride, a classic two wheel drive Chevy Blazer that he wants to trick out and flip for a big profit.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Twisted Chopper : Dee Snider from Twisted Sister drops by the shop to get a new "Sugar Bear" front end put on his Von Dutch chopper. Danny makes a road trip to LA to pick up the front end.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Back in Time : Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift; a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in their pasture. Can Danny bring it back to her original glory'

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: 70s Scoot : Danny takes on a psychedelic chopper project that is so 70s cool, he's worried he might not be able to give it to the customer when it's done.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: True Fire Fiasco : A memorial bike project poses a series of challenges for the paint team after builder Shannon doesn't get all the necessary information from the customer.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Salty Shelby : Dennis has always dreamed of owning the bright orange 1970 Shelby GT500 that kicked his ass in a drag race. Returning customer Rikk wants to get his rare 1970 Chrysler 300 Hurst in shape. But the car is plagued by a mystifying list of gremlins.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: One Tough Customer : Robby wants to convert a 1926 Ford Model T to a far rarer 1914 C Cab. Dan agrees to the plan, but soon has cause to regret it. Anthony buys a 69 Chevrolet Camaro Convertible, but the car of his dreams is an accident waiting to happen.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Night Prowler : Brothers Jacob and Paul’s 1965 Chevy Impala nicknamed the Night Prowler would have been better named the Night Slug. Don shows up with a 1967 Corvette and a massive list of work that he wants done. Dan doesn’t know which is worse: the list, or the car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Beauty and the Bee : When Ovide purchased his 1957 Bel Air sight unseen, the car was a rusted piece of junk so it’s on Dan to figure out how to restore this classic. Dino loves to go fast. His 1969 Super Bee is anything but super. Dan is tasked to feed Dino’s need for speed.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Rags to Riches : Nick bought his wife Danielle a 1953 Chevy Pickup for her 28th birthday. The couple wants a perfect FantomWorks restoration. The truck has other ideas. Eric’s rare 1939 LaSalle is a sight to behold, but it hasn’t seen a wrench in eighty years.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Perfect 10 : Mike thought his 1967 Chevy K10 Pick Up needed paint improvement. Dan quickly realizes that the car needs much more. Nobody restores 1970 Opel Kadett, so there are no parts anywhere for Harry’s car that needs a lot of everything.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: FantomWorks Goes Postal : Ron and Valerie want Dan to restore their 1963 Jeep Willy’s Fleetvan, but the problems run deeper than the seams hidden beneath inches of filler. Grady’s Z28 breaks down so often that he’s never had it out of second gear.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Shake And Bake : John thinks his 1958 Corvette is ‘mostly original’ but Dan finds a mismatched assortment of poor-quality parts and bad repairs. Chelsea wants FantomWorks to fix up a rare 1971 Fury for her father, Rikk. The car has previously caught on fire 3 times!

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: That Sinking Feeling : Tom and Patti want to drive their 1967 Amphicar on land and water, but the hybrid boat-car has problems from stem to stern. Doc Pellerin hasn’t started his ultra-rare Austin 10/4 in years. He needs Dan to get it running for a major car show in four days.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: French Fried : Daniel wants FantomWorks to swap out the V6 of his 1968 Mustang Convertible with the V8 from a donor car. Stacia and Eugenia need Dan’s help to transform their quirky 1962 Citroen 2CV from a ‘problem child’ to a reliable car.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: I'm So Dead : A woman stops eating because she believes she is dead; a runner goes blind in one eye during a marathon and takes a detour to the ER; doctors are baffled by an ER tech's stroke-like symptoms, until someone he loves also becomes ill.

programme.title: The Martha Stewart Channel
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Seeded : Seeded whole-wheat English muffins; seeded Saratoga torte; light and crispy whole-grain seeded wafer crackers.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Latin American Cookies : Cinnamon sugar-coated polvorones; bite-sized sandwich cookies; Guatemalan champurradas made with sesame seeds.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday : Hannah Heimbuch and Martha demonstrate how to prepare fish for cooking; Chef Marcus Samuelsson makes cured king salmon and halibut en papillote; Martha breaks down a Dungeness crab.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vegan Cuisine Redefined : Martha and Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes; Martha and Chef Daniel make a refreshing cocktail and gazpacho, followed by mushroom and seaweed baked rice and a rhubarb cobbler for dessert.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Authentic Greek Cuisine : Martha and Chef Costas Spiliadis of Estiatorio Milos make Taramosalata and salad; they build an eggplant and zucchini tower with tzatziki; then, they salt-bake a fish served with yogurt.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Jean-Georges and the Tin Building : Martha tours NYC's Tin Building, guided by chef and owner Jean-Georges; Martha is then joined by three Tin Building chefs and makes a lemon pizza, french onion soup, and chili mala chicken.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Art of Raw Food : Martha and Omar Abou-Ismail make miso soup and a bean-free hummus with flatbread made with raw ingredients; Martha and Omar whip up a tabouli salad followed by sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Baking Baguettes and Breads : Martha tours Breads Bakery with owner Gadi Paleg and learns about their award-winning baked goods; Martha and bakers make Breads Bakery's baguette, challah, and egg sandwich.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Chef David Burke's Modern Classics : Chef David Burke brings his modern classic dishes to Martha's kitchen; a bacon clothesline, calamari noodles, miso chicken with ginger and vegetables, and key lime pie are on the menu.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha Throws a Clam Bake : Martha heads to her local seafood market, Mt. Kisco Seafood, to pick-up the perfect ingredients for a clam bake; broiled salmon and delicious creamed spinach.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Know Your Vegetables : Steamed artichokes with tarragon butter; braised leeks; fried okra; whole-roasted garlic.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Sauces : Bearnaise sauce; Kansas City barbecue sauce; tartar sauce with capers, shallots and cornichons; cocktail sauce; salsa verde.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Pork : Porchetta, a highly seasoned roasted pork; glazed ham; pork and plums.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Potatoes : Scalloped potatoes; potato salad; pureed potatoes; smashed potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Salads : Frisee aux lardons; Caesar salad; stacked butter lettuce with citrus and yuzu vinaigrette.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Corn : Corn fritters; corn stock serves as the base for summer corn chowder; homemade creamed corn.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Eat Your Greens : Sorrel soup; pasta with grilled sardines and bitter greens; Swiss chard frittata; kale Caesar salad; escarole.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: One-Pot Meals : Stovetop clambake in a stockpot; risotto with shrimp and herbs in a pressure cooker; poached cod with tomatoes in a skillet; arroz con pollo in a Dutch oven.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Steakhouse : Baked stuffed clams; searing a porterhouse steak; creamed spinach; baked potatoes with various garnishes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Mushrooms : Buckwheat crepes filled with a mushroom mixture; vegetarian mushroom ragu served on rigatoni; French mushroom soup; mushroom risotto made with farro.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Sandwiches : Five classic sandwiches -- roasted chicken club, New Orleans po'boy with oysters, muffuletta, applewood-smoked bacon and fried egg sandwich, and a Reuben.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds : Martha's azalea grove is bursting with the last flowers of spring; then everything you need to know about hostas; Martha takes up bird watching.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford : Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill, where everything began for Martha in the 1970s; then back to her Bedford farm for a garden club tour - a peek inside Martha's gardens past and present.

programme.title: America's Lost Treasures
programme.desc: Los Angeles : Curt and Kinga host an open call for objects and artifacts at the Los Angeles Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: America's Lost Treasures
programme.desc: Santa Ana : Lost treasures at the Bowers Museum of Cultural Art in Santa Ana, California.

programme.title: Monster Nation
programme.desc: Scooter Dudes; a Hog Pull.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Drilling Lessons : Brandon must seek the help of a rival driller; Oscar gives Brandon a final notice; a small mistake halts drilling.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: Double Cross : A gas build up threatens the crew; Freddie arrives for an impromptu rig inspection; tension rises at couple's therapy.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: End of the Line : Brandon has a run-in with the law; Cheston breaks his promise to get Brandon out of jail; Cheston and Mitch compete to fill a vacant driller slot.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage
programme.desc: Pony Cars : Jay loves when Fluffy comes to visit so they can rediscover cars from his youth.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage
programme.desc: In the Line of Duty : The Dodge Demon 170 makes Jay smile after laying a patch of rubber; Jay's Rolls-Royce Merlin engine is 27 liters, the engine credited for winning WWII.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage
programme.desc: Armed and Dangerous : Racing wheels hold untold stories; Mike Joy shares his vast knowledge of motorsports; Dr. Nagamatsu preserves his friend Max Balchowsky's racecar, the Old Yeller II.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage
programme.desc: Moving Masterpieces : Fenders that stretch for days, tight and sporty proportions and influential designers unite this cross section of cars from vastly different ages.

programme.title: Monster Garage
programme.desc: Wheelie Ambulance : Master designers, builders and fabricators from around the world have travelled here to turn a 1983 Ford ambulance into a pouncing carnivore; it will not only go zero to sixty in five seconds, but rise into a full wheelie stand on the way.

programme.title: Monster Garage
programme.desc: West Coast Chipper : Jesse and his team convert a PT Cruiser into a wood chipping monster.

programme.title: Monster Garage
programme.desc: Mini; Snowmobile : The team takes a brand spanking new Mini Cooper and turns it into a snowmobile, blasting through powder, blazing up ski slopes and flying over snowboard ramps.

programme.title: Monster Garage
programme.desc: Vegas Wedding Chapel : Newly-ordained minister Jesse James conducts a wedding ceremony in a Chevy Suburban that he has converted into a chapel, complete with a fire-breathing pipe organ and an automated rice thrower.

programme.title: Verminators
programme.desc: Roach Motherload : A roach infestation threatens a child's health; Jamie faces his fears on a black widow job; Mike deploys the full arsenal to track rats; Gary battles termites.

programme.title: Verminators
programme.desc: No Kill Solution : A homeowner is reduced to tears when mice are removed; Mike and J.D. try to save a hive of bees.

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: Clippers : The team builds the world's biggest hair clippers during a five-day span.

programme.title: Big

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Open for Business! The Leaf Moving Service : An ominous black smoke appears over the Land of Greens, and all of sudden Choji and company are attacked by an unidentified Ninja!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Targeted Merchants : While questioning Yurinoshin and Shun, the Hidden Leaf squad learns the truth about Shun's true identity.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Limitless Supply of Ninja Tools : Naruto and the others are attacked by Ruiga, the first evil ninja, who can draw water from the earth to use as weapons.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Bewildering Forest : After evading the ambush by the Ninja Dropouts, Naruto, Gantetsu, and Todoroki find themselves in a forest maze that confuses a human's sense of direction.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Memories of the fire : The relationship between Gantetsu and Todoroki is revealed, increasing the tension between the two.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: To Each His Own Path : After a heated battle, Naruto has the enemy cornered, but a boy is taken. This boy turns out to be Akio, Todoroki's younger brother, who Todoroki thought was dead.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Faded memories : Naruto comes upon an injured youth who has lost his memory. Tsunade is cautious about the boy's presence, but Naruto is impressed by the boy's kindness and insists on allowing the boy to stay.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Recovering reality : Tsunade believes that Menma has some connection to the Hidden Sound Village, and Naruto and the others head to the Land of Rice Paddies to check into Menma's Memories.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A past to erase : While in battle, Naruto finds out that Menma is a member of the gang of bandits that attacked their village. Being called a traitor by the leader of the gang, Menma reveals his greatest secret.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Shukaku Target : Tsunade assigns Shikamaru a mission which is to solve the kidnapping case of the Sand Village ninja candidate Matsuri carried out by the Four Celestials. Leaf genin is called together once again.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Alliance of the Arena with the ninjas of Konoha : Shino, Hinata, and Neji search for the enemy while Shikamaru calculates the best time to attack.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sealed Arena: The Counterattack : Gaara's opponents are setting up a trap and he is later caught in their secret Jutsu, the Reverse Scale Position, and his sand is completely sealed.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Ultimate Weapon Resurrected : Gaara and Naruto corner Hoko, the last of the Celestial Four. It is then that they discover that his intention is to obtain Shukaku's chakra.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The match : Gaara becomes Shukaku and wins without problems, but after the fight each of those present decides which path to follow and Naruto travels with Jiraiya to improve.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.1 USAGI - SAILOR MOON - : Usagi Tsukino is clumsy at times and a bit of a crybaby. Luna, a black cat with a crescent moon on her forehead, gives Usagi a miracle brooch.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.2 AMI - SAILOR MERCURY - : Usagi becomes close with Ami Mizuno, a genius with an IQ of 300. But there's something odd about the students at Ami's seminar.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.3 REI - SAILOR MARS - : Disturbing rumors about a certain bus swirl all around Usagi. Amid the rumors, Usagi meets a beautiful shrine maiden with black hair named Rei Hino.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.4 MASQUERADE DANCE PARTY : Usagi learns of a secret treasure exhibit and, suspecting it might be the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' sneaks into the embassy of Kingdom D.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.5 MAKOTO - SAILOR JUPITER - : All of Juban Middle School is talking about the 'cursed bridal shop,' where every man who visits is said to disappear.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.6 TUXEDO MASK : Tuxedo Mask is reported to have committed many crimes to obtain the 'Legendary Silver Crystal,' but Usagi doesn't believe it…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.7 MAMORU CHIBA - TUXEDO MASK - : Usagi learns Tuxedo Mask's identity is actually Mamoru Chiba. Meanwhile, brainwashed people in Usagi's town wander around looking for Sailor Moon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.8 MINAKO - SAILOR V - : The one who saved Sailor Moon was actually Sailor V. Sailor V aka Minako Aino heads to the Tokyo Tower to settle things with Kunzite but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.9 SERENITY - PRINCESS - : While trying to protect Sailor Moon, Tuxedo Mask loses consciousness. Out of sorrow, Sailor Moon awakens as Princess Serenity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.10 MOON : Sailor Moon and the others land on the moon to solve the mystery of the Legendary Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.11 REUNION - ENDYMION - : Appearing before a devastated Usagi is a man who looks just like Mamoru but goes by 'Endo'. Usagi sees traces of Mamoru and thus approaches him…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.12 ENEMY - QUEEN METALIA - : Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.13 FINAL BATTLE - REINCARNATION - : To end her painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.14 CONCLUSION AND COMMENCEMENT - PETITE ÉTRANGERE - : Sailor Moon must destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the Legendary Silver Crystal is finally released.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.15 INFILTRATION - SAILOR MARS - : Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.16 ABDUCTION - SAILOR MERCURY - : When Rei is abducted Usagi begins to doubt the identity of Chibi-Usa. Ami is challenged by a mysterious woman at the World Chess Conference.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Act.17 SECRET - SAILOR JUPITER - : Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Bronx : The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Iran : Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Los Angeles : Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Colombia : Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya : Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Canada : The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tangier : Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Peru : Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Congo : Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Spain : Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Mexico : New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel : Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Copenhagen : Tony explores Copenhagen, the economic and cultural center of Denmark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily : Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit : Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tokyo : Tony travels to Tokyo in search of the city's dark, extreme underside.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Africa : Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Las Vegas : Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Punjab : Tony dives into the state of Punjab, India, starting off in Amritsar.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Pathogen : On Destiny, Chloe's behavior has become a cause of concern and a worried Scott makes a shocking discovery while searching her quarters: a journal with Alien script. He shows it to Young and Rush who decide they must keep a constant eye on Chloe.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Cloverdale : While exploring a new planet, Lt. Scott is attacked by an aggressive plant-like creature that infects him. Scott's circumstances turn dire and Tamara must search for a way to stop the alien infection from spreading while more creatures move in.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Inauguration : On his first day in office, the newly elected president of the United States is told about the Stargate program and must be brought up to speed on the past seven years of its existence. Starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Icon : On a distant planet the Stargate has become a symbol to the people, and some believe that the gods will return through it to reward the faithful. SG-1 realizes that those gods are the Goa'uld and warn of the danger they may face.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avatar : The team agrees that an easy VR simulator is a useless training tool against the Goa'uld. Teal'c lets it learn from him, but as he plays, the game sends a shock each time he dies, and if he doesn't defeat the game, the chair will kill him.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Affinity : Teal'c, having finally been cleared to live off-base, settles into his new neighborhood. His neighbors love him. He's quiet and he has become a sort of protector of his community but not everybody is as pleased about Teal'c's civilian assimilation.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Trial And Error : Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Greater Good : When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Malice : Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Visitation : With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Lockdown : When Jackson contracts a mysterious illness, O'Neill is convinced that a contagion has infected the base and orders a lockdown. But when Jackson reveals that he was actually possessed by Anubis, O'Neill must discover the identity of the new host!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Zero Hour : O'Neill deals with a visit from the president and negotiations between two warring tribes from Amra. When SG-1 is captured, he's forced to choose between the safety of the team and the fate of a planet, making him question his competency!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Date Rape : Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Burn-Out : When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Chop Shop : Detective Victor Isbecki's cover is blown during an investigation of a dangerous car theft ring and he becomes a hostage. Cagney and Lacey must work to help save him while coming to terms with their own failures in the investigation.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Partners : Cagney (Sharon Gless) is injured while in the line of duty by a fleeing liquor store robber. While Cagney is out recovering, Lacey (Tyne Daly) must come to terms with working with a new, temporary, partner. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Choices : Cagney and Lacey must find a new witness after their key witness in a case against a shady landlord passes away. They take to canvasing the building in question in the hopes of finding a new witness before the landlord is set free.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Child Witness : Cagney and Lacey are brought in by a school principal to investigate whether or not a six-year-old girl is being sexually abused. Things become more complicated when the little girl is coached by her father to recant her tale.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Heat : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are investigating vandalism at a railroad yard when Lacey is suddenly abducted by a dangerous young man (guest star Michael Madsen) escalating to a face-off between him and the SWAT Team.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Insubordination : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) find themselves investigating a cocaine dealing case that suddenly becomes much more complicated when their commanding officer turns out to be Dory McKenna (guest star Barry Primus).

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Old Debts : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are on the protection duty of a recently paroled cop killer while he awaits a new identity and is moved away. After he is murdered while under their protection, Cagney and Lacey work to find the murderer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Fathers & Daughters : When a man's suicide turns out to be a murder, Cagney and Lacey must figure out who the true murderer is after the man's wife and daughter both confess to the crime. The investigation only becomes more complicated when they discover more.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Taxi Cab Murders : When a string of violent murders takes place, Cagney and Lacey go undercover as Taxi Cab drivers to try and find the killer. Lacey's family becomes hysterical at the prospect, fearing that Lacey will lose her life in pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Unusual Occurrence : When a young boy refuses to comply with her commands and Cagney (Sharon Gless) is forced to shoot him, her life becomes a nightmare. Cagney must deal with having shot a young boy, while the press claims it to be racially motivated.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Thank God It's Monday : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) spend the weekend on duty going through old paperwork when they discover a warrant for a rape case that expires in 24 hours. The two must race to serve the warrant before it expires.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Hooked : During a drug raid, Cagney and Lacey arrest the man responsible for Dory McKenna's (guest star Barry Primus) drug rehabilitation on charges of narcotics possession. When the evidence disappears, Dory becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Lady Luck : Lacey stops a woman's attempted suicide but feels guilt and responsibility when the woman turns up murdered soon after. When Cagney and Lacey investigate the murder, they soon discover a world of massive gambling debts and loan sharks.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: American Dream : Cagney and Lacey investigate a series of fire-bombings in the garment district, and the trucking company that they suspect is behind them. Meanwhile, Harvey Lacey switches occupations and becomes a tax-shelter salesman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Happily Ever After : Cagney and Lacey investigate a larceny case after a stray bullet offers a new development in 32,000 petty theft cases. A singular credit department employee appears to be behind it all. Meanwhile, Dory McKenna proposes to Cagney.

programme.desc: The Roper : Will is having second thoughts about staying on at the Ponderosa, and outlaws hit the ranch and take him with them.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Return to Honor : Ben must travel to pay his respects after he learns of the death of his nephew Will. When he visits the grave, he finds his nephew barely alive with a bullet wound.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Enter Thomas Bowers : After a triumphant tour in Europe, a famous Negro singer encounters racial prejudice in Virginia City when he arrives for a concert.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: No Less a Man : The town council feels Roy Coffee can no longer do his job, and with the notorious Wagner gang on their way to rob the bank, everyone is in a panic.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Saga of Muley Jones : The Cartwrights are visited by their second cousin, Muley Jones of Weedville, Missouri who sings with a window-shattering voice and stirs up trouble with Indian negotiations that Ben is trying to ensure.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Pink Cloud Comes from Old Cathay : A headstrong Chinese girl (Marlo Thomas) visiting the Cartwrights incites labor unrest among local workers.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Pressure Game : Laura Dayton's Aunt Lil comes to visit and quickly decides it's time she helps the hesitant Adam propose to her favorite niece. Her plan is to make Adam jealous by using his cousin Will but it doesn't go exactly as planned.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Triangle : Adam and Laura are finally engaged. Adam is secretly building a house and planning for the future. Laura realizes that it's Will she is in love with.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Dark Past : Moody bounty hunter, Dev Farnum, shows up on the Ponderosa, where the Cartwrights are harboring the wife of the man he is after.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Old Sheba : As payment for a performance in a circus, Joe and Hoss are given an elephant. They want to keep it but encounter opposition from Adam and Ben.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Scapegoat : Hoss hires Waldo as a ranch hand after keeping Waldo from killing himself. Hoss soon learns that Waldo is lousy at his job and only causes problems for everyone else due to his clumsiness.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Invention of a Gunfighter : Joe teaches Johnny Chapman how to use a gun for defense. What Joe doesn't see is the deadly consequences that it has in the long run when Johnny becomes a gunfighter.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Thanks for Everything, Friend : After inadvertantly falling into the river, Adam is rescued by Tom Wilson. Wilson has feelings for Sue Miller, which bring him into trouble after her father is killed.
